Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We walked all the way to the dorm,[n]neither of us saying a word.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}...Oh! I-I'm sorry! I was just thinking about... what to say...[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 109 3 25 25}I was trying to come up with a topic you might be interested in, {f 4 1}-san, but... I couldn't think of anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}This is... Iwatodai Dorm, right? Do you live here, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I knew we were going the wrong direction, but... I-I couldn't bring myself to say anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I noticed we were going in the wrong direction. I should've spoken up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Um, I know you took time out of your schedule just for me, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we've gotten a little closer...[n]{f 1 1}
